study_title: Venom proteo-transcriptomics and genomics of social and solitary bees and wasps and other hymenopterans.
design: RNA Trizol-based extraction was conducted. For RNA library construction a low input protocol (Illumina Truseq) was used. Libraries were sequenced (150bp, paired end) on Illumina platform.
center: Institute for Insectbiotechnology, University of Giessen

study_title: RNA-Seq of deformed wing virus (DWV) infection on honey bee larvae
